name: Trait sliders and class selection persist into a run

planSteps.description: Set the bravery slider (data-testid trait-bravery) to 90 and the greed slider (data-testid trait-greed) to 20
Select the mage class card (data-testid class-mage)
Within about 30 seconds the results screen (#screen-results) becomes visible
The guild screen shows again and the bravery slider still reads 90 (settings persisted)
